id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS Resource Explorer search.

resource_count.description: A list containing the count of resources found, with information on whether the count is complete and the total number of resources.

resources.description: A list of resources returned by the search, each with details such as ARN, last reported time, owning account ID, region, resource type, and service.

view_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the view used for the search in AWS Resource Explorer.
